name: Google Sheet Table
description: Shows a public Google Sheet as an eInk-friendly table, with optional filtered summary mode.

title.title: Title
title.description: Optional. Leave empty to use the Google Sheet title.

sheetId.title: Google Sheet ID or URL
sheetId.description: Use a public Google Sheet ID, or paste the full Google Sheets URL.

gid.title: Sheet gid
gid.description: Optional worksheet gid. Leave empty for the first sheet.

namesText.title: Names to find
namesText.description: Optional filter mode. One exact value per line. Leave empty with no column mapping to show the sheet as-is.

displayNamesText.title: Display names
displayNamesText.description: Optional aliases, one per line: Full Name=Display Name.

columnsText.title: Column mapping
columnsText.description: Optional filter mode. One mapping per line, such as B=Group 1. Leave empty with no names to show the sheet as-is.

dateColumn.title: Date / label column
dateColumn.description: Spreadsheet column containing dates, row labels, or section labels.

maxEntries.title: Maximum rows
maxEntries.description: Limits table rows in default mode, or matching entries in filter mode.

includeSectionHeaders.title: Use labels from date column
includeSectionHeaders.description: Allow non-date values in the date/label column to appear in the Date column.

contrastHeader.title: Contrast table header
contrastHeader.description: Use background-colored text on a foreground-colored table header. Turn off to reverse it.

tableHeaderStyle.title: Table header style
tableHeaderStyle.description: Choose theme contrast, theme plain, or the formatting from the Google Sheet header row.

preserveTextStyles.title: Preserve text styles
preserveTextStyles.description: Apply exported bold, italic, underline, and strikethrough formatting.
